description: 20 fresh IT office scenarios (set B) — Gemini embedding test only

cases.title: Zoom camera shows black screen
cases.description: In Zoom meetings my laptop camera shows a black screen. Other participants cannot see me. Camera LED is on. Issue started after last Windows update.

cases.title: Excel macros disabled by policy
cases.description: Excel spreadsheets with macros stopped working. Message says macros have been disabled by organization policy. I need macros for monthly finance reporting.

cases.title: Possible ransomware on file server
cases.description: Files on the shared drive have strange .locked extensions and a ransom note appeared. Several teams cannot open documents. Need urgent security help.

cases.title: Cannot join guest WiFi network
cases.description: Visitor guest WiFi CORP-GUEST asks for credentials I do not have. Conference room iPad cannot connect for client demo in 30 minutes.

cases.title: Laptop stolen — remote wipe needed
cases.description: My company MacBook was stolen from a taxi. I need IT to remotely wipe the device and revoke access to corporate email and VPN immediately.

cases.title: OneDrive sync conflict loop
cases.description: OneDrive keeps showing sync conflict on shared project folder. Files duplicate with computer name suffix every hour. Cannot collaborate with team.

cases.title: Jira SSO login fails
cases.description: Jira shows SAML authentication error when I sign in with corporate SSO. Confluence works fine. Need access to sprint board today.

cases.title: Keyboard keys double-typing
cases.description: Several keys on my company laptop keyboard register double characters. External USB keyboard works fine. Hardware seems faulty.

cases.title: PostgreSQL replication lag alert
cases.description: Monitoring alert: PostgreSQL replica is 45 minutes behind primary. Reporting dashboards show stale data. DBA attention needed.

cases.title: Firewall port open request
cases.description: Need firewall rule to allow inbound HTTPS from vendor IP 203.0.113.50 to our staging API server for integration testing next week.

cases.title: UPS beeping after power outage
cases.description: Server room UPS beeping continuously after building power blip. Rack servers still up but alarm won't stop.

cases.title: Intune device compliance block
cases.description: Company phone blocked from email — Intune says device is non-compliant because OS patch is missing. Cannot approve MFA requests.

cases.title: BitLocker recovery key needed
cases.description: Windows laptop asks for BitLocker recovery key after motherboard replacement. I do not have the 48-digit key saved.

cases.title: Remote desktop disconnects every 5 min
cases.description: RDP to office workstation drops connection every five minutes with error 0x204. VPN stays connected. Happens from home only.

cases.title: Add user to email distribution list
cases.description: Please add new hire sarah.chen@company.com to the all-engineering@company.com distribution list for announcements.

cases.title: Kubernetes pod CrashLoopBackOff
cases.description: Production namespace payment-api pods in CrashLoopBackOff after last deploy. Logs show OOMKilled. Need platform team escalation.

cases.title: Badge won't open office door
cases.description: My building access badge stopped working at main entrance turnstile. Still works in parking garage. Started this morning.

cases.title: Salesforce SSO redirect loop
cases.description: Salesforce login redirects in endless loop after identity provider change. Cannot access customer accounts for quarterly close.

cases.title: Antivirus quarantined legitimate tool
cases.description: CrowdStrike quarantined our internal dev CLI tool as malware. Build pipeline failing on all agents. Need security review and whitelist.

cases.title: Monitor wrong resolution after dock
cases.description: When I dock my laptop the external 4K monitor stuck at 1024x768 blurry resolution. Undock redock does not fix. Display settings greyed out.
